mapper.select: SELECT ro.id, ro.repair_no, ro.contract_id, ro.house_id, ro.landlord_id, ro.tenant_user_id, ro.title, ro.repair_type, ro.content, ro.is_urgent, ro.expect_visit_time, ro.attachment_url, ro.status, ro.handle_note, ro.handle_voucher_url, ro.repair_amount, ro.payment_status, ro.cancel_reason, ro.reject_reason, ro.accept_time, ro.finish_time, ro.tenant_confirm_time, ro.paid_time, ro.create_time, ro.update_time, rc.contract_no, h.name AS house_name, h.cover AS house_cover, lu.username AS landlord_name, tu.username AS tenant_name FROM repair_order ro LEFT JOIN rental_contract rc ON rc.id = ro.contract_id LEFT JOIN house h ON h.id = ro.house_id LEFT JOIN landlord l ON l.id = ro.landlord_id LEFT JOIN user lu ON lu.id = l.user_id LEFT JOIN user tu ON tu.id = ro.tenant_user_id WHERE ro.id = #{id}
